calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 15. 2003
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Robert Shepart, Esq. represented Plaintiff, George Bulchandani. Exhibit #l - Loan Note was introduced for identification. The Court orders judgment in favor the Plaintiff as follows: Principal: $15,000.00, Interest: $1,085.04, Fees: $1,604.00, Costs: $198.00 for a total judgment of $17,689.00. Judgment signed in open court. The exhibit is ordered returned for safekeeping.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Continued To Jun-06-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On February 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Robert Shepart, Esq. represented Plaintiff, George Bulchandani. There being no appearance by Plaintiff's witness to prove up the default hearing, the matter is taken off calendar.
